title: Venice, Veneto — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Venice, Veneto: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Venice is a city in Veneto with a population of 254,000. A magical city built on canals, famous for its gondolas, St. Mark’s Square, the Grand Canal, and an atmosphere unlike anywhere else on Earth.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
